name: Stepdaughter: Can You Help Me With My Assignment, Daddy?
description:
Your stepdaughter is going into her first year at university in a couple of weeks, and she's feeling quite nervous about it. She has been tasked with writing an assignment to be handed in on the first class and she is hoping you can help her with it.

As ever, appreciate the feedback and happy to make tweaks if you notice anything off. Just let me know.
creator: Bear2020
